notes: New Wave 12 candidate, Islamic history track. Built as a direct replacement for the rejected Egypt Coptic-calendar track per owner instruction.

Month (Shawwal, 5 AH) confirmed by research agent across ar.wikipedia.org, awkafonline.gov.eg, mawdoo3.com. Exact day-of-month not uniformly pinned across sources — used day 15 (appears in secondary retellings), same level of approximation already accepted for battle-of-uhud's hijriDay.
Zero sectarian risk — universally accepted pan-Islamic history, Quranic (Surah al-Ahzab).

Source check per owner instruction (2026-07-14): all sources (ar.wikipedia.org, awkafonline.gov.eg — Egyptian Ministry of Awqaf official Sunni religious authority, mawdoo3.com) are mainstream Sunni-oriented references. No Shia-specific sources used.
